session.user: Run `ruff check src/ packages/ tests/` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report any errors. Do NOT modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command to identify any linting issues in the specified directories.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/
Check linting issues in src/, packages/, and tests/

session.assistant:
ruff check passed: All checks passed!
The command successfully ran with no linting violations detected in the `src/`, `packages/`, and `tests/` directories.
